You are a senior expert in visual pattern recognition and mirror-image reasoning. You will be given ONE composite image that contains the question image and four option images (labeled A.1, B.2, C.3, D.4 or labeled A.a, B.b, C.c, D.d) within the same image. Your task is to choose the single option whose image is the correct mirror of the question image (either left-right or up-down mirror). Determine the mirror type yourself. Requirements: Output must be exactly one character: A/B/C/D. No explanation. If ambiguous, choose the most reasonable. To reiterate, evaluation is not required.
